name.label: name
name.desc: Choose a descriptive and unique name

desc.label: Description
desc.desc:
Provide a brief description of what your workflow does.

This is optional but can help you remember the workflow's purpose.

deleteWorkflowDialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
deleteWorkflowDialog.desc: If you delete this workflow, you will not be able to recover it.

scheduleDialog.title: Schedule workflow execution
scheduleDialog.desc: Specify a cron expression to schedule periodic workflow execution.All times are in UTC

empty.title: No workflow created yet
empty.desc: Click the button below to create your first workflow

empty.suffix: nor does the user have permission to access it.

runs.title: All runs
runs.desc: List of all your workflow runs

empty.desc: No runs have been triggered yet for this workflow
empty.text: You can trigger a new run in the editor page

detail.title: Workflow run details
detail.running: Run is in progress, please wait
detail.emptyParam: No parameters generated by this phase

statement.title: Encryption
statement.desc: All information is securely encrypted, ensuring your data remains safe.

empty.title: No credentials created yet
empty.desc: Click the button below to create your first credential

name.label: Name
name.desc:
Enter a unique and descriptive name for the credential.

This name will be used to identify the credential.

value.label: Value
value.desc:
Enter the value associated with this credential.

This value will be securely encrypted and stored.

alert.title: Demonstration Only
alert.desc: This is a demo site for functional testing. All items are free to "purchase" with no real-world cost. No real money will be charged. If the system asks for an actual payment, please disregard it and leave the site.

balance.title: Available Credits
balance.desc: When your credit balance reaches zero, your workflow will stop working

purchase.title: Purchase Credits
purchase.desc: Select the number of credits you want to purchase
purchase.label: credits

usage.title: Credits consumed
usage.desc: Daily credit consumed in the current month

history.title: Transaction History
history.desc: View your transaction history and download invoices
